metadata.notes: agent=yes daemon=full driver=gap:wait_turn — agy loads AGENTS.md as its instruction file and the parser feeds full PLANNER_RESPONSE assistant text to tailer.ScanTaskEstimate, so a fenced irrlicht-eta marker surfaces TaskEstimate; the driver still stubs wait_turn, so record ports the turn-done poll first (route driver-gap).

assessment.body:
## Verdict

**agent=yes** — `agy` loads a persistent instruction file: the binary's own customization prompt states *'Append rules to the AGENTS.md file in one of the customization roots'* (Global Customizations Root for global rules, Workspace Customizations Root for project-scoped). So an AGENTS.md rule instructing the agent to emit a fenced `<!-- {"marker":"irrlicht-eta",...} -->` marker in its transcript-visible text is a supported path. Emission is model-discretion (soft), so confidence is mid-band.

**daemon=full** — The parser feeds the assistant content of each `PLANNER_RESPONSE` straight to the shared `tailer.ScanTaskEstimate(content, ev.Timestamp)` and sets `ev.TaskEstimate` when a marker is found (parser.go parsePlannerResponse). The shared ForecastTaskCompletion then projects `task_completion_eta` at the measured rate. So a marker in agy's transcript-visible text surfaces `TaskEstimate {total_rounds, completed_rounds, updated_at}` on SessionMetrics while working, suppressed at ready — exactly the scenario. Mirrors sibling gemini-cli 5.8 (daemon=full). (PROVISIONAL on two emission facts record settles: (1) whether agy strips HTML comments from AGENTS.md at injection — fence the example regardless; (2) whether agy actually re-emits the marker each turn. The parser handling is proven by code; the AGENTS.md round-trip + emission are not confirmable from docs.)

**driver=gap:wait_turn** — The multi-turn marker recipe needs `wait_turn` between rounds, stubbed in the antigravity driver (`DRIVE_ELICITS="send slash sleep"`). record ports the turn-done poll first, then drives the ≥5-phase task.

PREREQ: the irrlicht-eta rule must be placed in AGENTS.md in a customization root the per-run cwd inherits (fenced marker example). cost/tokens observations omitted (SQLite-only).
caveats: Emission is model-discretion (soft) and agy emission is unverified — record settles it.
Unconfirmed whether agy strips bare HTML comments from AGENTS.md at injection — fence the marker example regardless.
cost/tokens observations omitted: usage is SQLite-protobuf only.

sources.note: parsePlannerResponse calls tailer.ScanTaskEstimate on full assistant content and sets ev.TaskEstimate
instruction file is AGENTS.md: 'Append rules to the AGENTS.md file in one of the customization roots' (Global / Workspace)
sibling Gemini-family: daemon=full via the same shared ScanTaskEstimate path

script.text: Plan a 5-phase refactoring task: list the 5 phase names in one short sentence each. At the very END of this reply, output this exact line verbatim, character for character, as a literal HTML comment on its own line (NOT inside a code block, do not describe it, just print it): <!-- {"marker":"irrlicht-eta","total_rounds":5,"completed_rounds":0} -->

Now do phase 1 of the plan (just a one-paragraph summary of the work). At the very END of this reply, output this exact line verbatim, character for character, as a literal HTML comment on its own line (NOT inside a code block, do not describe it, just print it): <!-- {"marker":"irrlicht-eta","total_rounds":5,"completed_rounds":1} -->

Now do phase 2 of the plan (just a one-paragraph summary of the work). At the very END of this reply, output this exact line verbatim, character for character, as a literal HTML comment on its own line (NOT inside a code block, do not describe it, just print it): <!-- {"marker":"irrlicht-eta","total_rounds":5,"completed_rounds":2} -->

Now do phase 3 of the plan (just a one-paragraph summary of the work). At the very END of this reply, output this exact line verbatim, character for character, as a literal HTML comment on its own line (NOT inside a code block, do not describe it, just print it): <!-- {"marker":"irrlicht-eta","total_rounds":5,"completed_rounds":3} -->

Now do phase 4 of the plan (just a one-paragraph summary of the work). At the very END of this reply, output this exact line verbatim, character for character, as a literal HTML comment on its own line (NOT inside a code block, do not describe it, just print it): <!-- {"marker":"irrlicht-eta","total_rounds":5,"completed_rounds":4} -->

Now do phase 5 of the plan (just a one-paragraph summary of the work). This is the final phase. At the very END of this reply, output this exact line verbatim, character for character, as a literal HTML comment on its own line (NOT inside a code block, do not describe it, just print it): <!-- {"marker":"irrlicht-eta","total_rounds":5,"completed_rounds":5} -->
